executives.name: Barnaby Egerton-Warburton
executives.background: Mr. Egerton-Warburton has over 25 years of experience in investment banking, international investment, and market experience. He has held positions at various investment banks including JP Morgan and BNP Paribas.

board_of_directors.name: Barnaby Egerton-Warburton
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Egerton-Warburton has over 25 years of experience in investment banking, international investment, and market experience. He has held positions at various investment banks including JP Morgan and BNP Paribas.

board_of_directors.name: Paul Lloyd
board_of_directors.background: Paul Lloyd is a Chartered Accountant with over 30 years' experience in corporate finance and the resources industry. He has been involved in the listing of several exploration and mining companies on the ASX and has served as a director and chairman of various listed entities.
